archetype: Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5) with Liquid Tech Twist

headings.rules: Must be used for all H1-H4. Do NOT use Inter for headings.

body.rules: Strictly for body text, data tables, and small labels.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8) to let the glass breathe. Avoid cramped data views.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Do not use a traditional full-bleed sidebar. Make it a 'Floating Glass Panel' (m-4 rounded-2xl glassmorphism).
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Use Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, gap-6, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Every widget stretches to fill its height.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and data. Avoid centering everything.

surface_strategies.liquid_background: The root background must be deep void black (#05050A). Behind the main layout, add 2-3 absolute-positioned div 'blobs' (e.g., w-96 h-96 rounded-full bg-blue-600/20 and bg-cyan-500/20) with massive blur (blur-[120px] or blur-3xl). These act as the 'liquid' light source shining through the glass.
surface_strategies.glass_cards: Standardize this exact utility combo for cards/panels: 'bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]'. For premium realism, add 'border-t-white/20' and 'border-l-white/20' to simulate specular highlights.
surface_strategies.glass_modals: Dialogs/Modals must use heavy glass: 'bg-[#05050A]/40 backdrop-blur-3xl border border-white/10'.
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: Use the liquid gradient for primary CTAs: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2f81f7] to-[#00E5FF] text-black font-semibold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,229,255,0.5)] transition-all'. Note the text-black for APCA contrast.
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: Glass outline: 'bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10'.

component_specifics.landing_page: Use 'landing_hero_bg' as the section background. Layer a heavy glass header. The two CTA cards (Quick Check & Full Assessment) must be prominent glass panels with hover lift (-translate-y-1).
component_specifics.login_register: Split layout: Image on the left (use 'hero_shapes'), Form on the right inside a floating glass card.
component_specifics.radar_charts: Charts must look holographic. Set grid lines to 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)'. Set radar fill to 'rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.15)' with a 2px solid cyan (#00E5FF) stroke.
component_specifics.chat_interface: AI assessment chat: User bubbles are subtle glass ('bg-white/10 border border-white/5'). AI bubbles are liquid-tinted ('bg-blue-900/30 border border-blue-500/30 backdrop-blur-md').
component_specifics.tables: Remove all solid backgrounds. Tables are transparent. Headers: 'border-b border-white/10 text-white/50'. Rows: 'border-b border-white/5 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors'.
component_specifics.forms_inputs: Inputs, Selects, and Textareas: 'bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:bg-white/10 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] transition-all'.

landing_hero_bg.description: Abstract liquid fluid gradient background, deep navy blue with vibrant cyan leaks. Use as the hero/landing page background.

dashboard_ambient_bg.description: Corporate dashboard background with subtle liquid waves. Use behind the glass sidebar and dashboard grid.

hero_shapes.description: 3D liquid glass shapes. Use for the left side of the Login/Register split layout.

abstract_blue_wave.description: Abstract blue wavy lines. Use for empty states, report covers, or card accents.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over blurred areas maintains at least 4.5:1 contrast. Use drop-shadow on text if the liquid background becomes too bright.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Completely overhaul the UI from solid dark blocks (#111827) to the 'Liquid Glass' theme.
2. Implement the 'liquid_background' strategy at the root layout (App.jsx or equivalent) so it persists across pages, using massive blurred divs.
3. Convert the Sidebar to a floating glass panel (m-4).
4. Update all standard Shadcn/Tailwind cards to use the 'glass_cards' utility combo defined above.
5. Enforce Outfit font for all Headings, Inter for Body.
6. Update the Recharts/Radar charts to use the holographic cyan/transparent styling.
7. Consume the provided media URLs for their designated sections.
